arts.ttl: Chelsea willing to offer €30m for “mentally strong” Premier League winner
arts.sum: Chelsea are keen on signing the Barcelona attacker Ferran Torres at the end of the season. The 24-year-old has played in the Premier League before with Manchester City and he won the league title with them during the 2020-21 season. arts.sum: Aston Villa signed defender Andres Garcia from Levante in the January transfer window and he has come straight into the team Aston Villa did their homework before proceeding with a move to bring young right-back Andres Garcia to the club in the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: How to watch Aston Villa vs Chelsea - TV channel, live stream and kick-off time
arts.sum: The chase for the Champions League is set to heat up this weekend as Aston Villa face a tough match against Chelsea as the London side ventures up to Villa Park for Saturday's late kick-off. Aston Villa vs Chelsea will take the late kick-off spot with the match starting at 5.30pm on Saturday, February 22.

arts.sum: Chelsea have now joined the list of suitors for Sevilla defender Loïc Badé and are ‘willing to bet heavily’ on the Frenchman this summer. That’s according to Fichajes, who report that after the failed move to Aston Villa in January, it is now Chelsea who want to take Badé to the Premier League.
